violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the ware wash area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026
Clean dishes were observed stored directly next to the hand sink in the back storage area. Splash guard to be added or utensils/dishes to be relocated. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 05/14/2026

Various milk products was observed held at (46-51) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of milk. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023

Beverage cooler located in the front counter area was not in good repair(inadequate ambient temperatures).Establishment not allowed to store any TCS foods in refrigeration unit until repaired/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the counters in front end area under equipment have an accumulation food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023

The floors under equipment throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2023
